prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A Consul API call unexpectedly returns permission denied. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/consul that (1) parse or attach ACL tokens to the request context, (2) enforce ACL policy decisions for the request path, and (3) generate the deny response or audit log entry that surfaces the incident.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the hashicorp-consul fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: A Consul API call unexpectedly returns permission denied. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/consul that (1) parse or attach ACL tokens to the request context, (2) enforce ACL policy decisions for the request path, and (3) generate the deny response or audit log entry that surfaces the incident.

params.search_pattern: ACL OR permission denied OR authorize OR token
